name: Society Garden & Community
description: Outdoor community garden for festive greetings and community campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission warm outdoor community background artwork. The environment is a landscaped society garden or courtyard: manicured grass, decorative plants, stone pathways, premium outdoor furniture, modern apartment towers visible in soft background. Families and neighbours are interacting naturally in the outdoor space — children playing, adults conversing in small groups, a warm community gathering feel. Lighting is golden-hour or pleasant daylight. The atmosphere communicates: safe, thriving community, well-managed society, quality of life. NO product, NO technology, NO screens. Pure community and environment. Bottom 30% must graduate to dark for text overlay. This scene works for both festive greetings and awareness campaigns.

inputs.label: Festival / Occasion
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Diwali, New Year (leave blank for generic community)

inputs.label: Greeting or Campaign Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Celebrating the community that calls this home
suggestions: Celebrating the community that calls this home
May this festival bring joy and togetherness to your society
Wishing your community a joyful celebration
A thriving community deserves a well-managed society
